title: chrozophora tinctoria
intro: Chrozophora tinctoria, also known as the madder plant or dyer's madder, is a flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrozophora tinctoria include reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of extracts, teas, and topical creams, which can be made by drying and powdering the roots and leaves.
